case_title: ANDREY SARKISOV ET AL VS. GENERAL MOTORS, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISCOVERY 302, AUG-15-2023. HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER COMPELLING THE DEPOSITION OF STEWART CHEVROLET AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. PLAINTIFF STIPULATES TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE PRO TEM JUDGE. THE PRO TEM JUDGE AND COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF (APPEARING REMOTELY) AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION ON THEIR BEHALF. THE COURT ACKNOWLEDGES THAT THERE IS NO KNOWN OPPOSITION TO THE SUBJECT MOTION. RULING IS DISCUSSED. THE COURT WITHDRAWS ITS TENTATIVE RULING TO TAKE PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER COMPELLING THE DEPOSITION OF STEWART CHEVROLET AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS OFF CALENDAR AND THE MOTION IS GRANTED. THE PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM TO DAVIDIDAHO14@GMAIL.COM.JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: R. WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)
